title: AMD K6 released April 2, 1997
content:
AMD launched its K6 microprocessor on April 2, 1997. It was a competitor for Intel’s Pentium II CPU, but unlike the Pentium II, it plugged into the previous-generation Pentium socket. Being less expensive than a Pentium II and using less

The post AMD K6 released April 2, 1997 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
